steps.title: Show decline across years
steps.content: The researcher's claim is about a decline in the duration of lake ice between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. A supporting example must compare the same lake across those years and show fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Use the lake example
steps.content: A and D give threshold facts without proving decline across time. B says Lake Neusiedl had more ice days later, which is an increase. Oulujarvi shows the needed pattern of fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81. The answer is C.
